englishDefinitions: Something very important, serious, or impressive.
A person, event, or situation that receives a lot of attention or matters a lot.
persianTranslation: چیز بسیار مهم یا قابل توجه
examples: Getting into that university is a very big deal.
Don’t laugh; this interview is a very big deal to me.
In their town, the festival is a very big deal.
